ops.title: Clean-slate retrain chain (T0–T3): clean dataset → eval refreeze → fresh-epoch gate → first clean-data retrain
ops.description: Part 0 of the approved plan (plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md), taking over the capture-fix arc handoff (de3f9bd, 6d4f06a, df672ed, c95c9ebf). T0: rebuild ~/.cc-steer/dataset/ + HF push from the repaired DB (the handoff's "clean dataset on HF" claim had no journal evidence — re-produce, don't trust); EmptyWatcherPrompt invariant must hold; journal to the pipeline-runs log. T1: wipe ~/.cc-steer/eval/ wholesale (NOT the store, NOT the registry/serving model), refreeze from the clean test split under EmptyEvalContext; document the deliberate-refreeze rule. T2: --fresh-epoch promotion (no-incumbent absolute bar: budget held + AUC floor + coverage sign-test; crash if clean-frame incumbent probs exist; prune dirty lineage only after clean promote). T3: manual `cc-steer retrain --component gate|watcher --fresh-epoch` ($15 Tinker cap), then verify the Sunday lane skips on unchanged digest.

ops.text: T0: export completes with zero empty positives (EmptyWatcherPrompt silent) and the HF push is journaled in the pipeline-runs log with the new dataset digest
T1: ~/.cc-steer/eval/ contains only the new frame + MANIFEST; freeze_eval re-run is an idempotent no-op; refresh rule documented
T2: fresh-epoch tests pass incl. crash-on-reuse when clean-frame incumbent probs exist
T3: both lanes journal promote lines, cc-steer models shows the clean versions current, the watch daemon serves them, and the next weekly pass journals a digest-unchanged skip
